title: Hormuz June reopening 'unlikely' per analysts; Fitch estimates end of July — IndexBox analysis
snippet: Analysts say a June reopening of the Strait of Hormuz is 'unlikely.' Fitch Ratings estimates end of July at the earliest for any reopening. The US blockade continues and the mutual halt between Iran and Israel does not address the Hormuz issue directly.
tag_reason: Specific Hormuz reopening analysis — supplements oil price data in src-1658; Fitch end-of-July estimate is new timeline data
